/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libtest_interface__rosidl_generator_py.so -o rosidl_generator_py/test_interface/libtest_interface__rosidl_generator_py.so CMakeFiles/test_interface__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/test_interface/msg/_obj_position_s.c.o CMakeFiles/test_interface__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/test_interface/msg/_resnet_msg_s.c.o CMakeFiles/test_interface__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/test_interface/msg/_video_log_msg_s.c.o CMakeFiles/test_interface__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/test_interface/msg/_object_msg_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/userdata/dev_ws/build/test_interface:/opt/ros/humble/lib: /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so libtest_interface__rosidl_typesupport_c.so libtest_interface__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
